title: Seeds of Vengeance
actors: Bernard J. Durning, Charles Edler, Eugenie Besserer
plot: In the mountains of West Virginia, Alderson Cree is mortally wounded in an ambush by Kip Ryerson, after Kip's wife, Martha, seeks refuge at the Crees's home for herself and her stepdaughter, Eileen. Cree makes his young son, David...
